parameters-en.Rate: Controls the speed or rate of the flanger. When set to note values, Speed follows the system tempo.
parameters-en.Width: Controls how wide and dramatic the flanging sweep appears.
parameters-en.Manual: Controls the degree of phase shifting. Has no effect when Width is set to 100%.
parameters-en.Enhance: Controls the amount of feedback in the effected signal. WARNING! When set to higher values, Harmonic Flanger can begin to self-oscillate and get really loud.
parameters-en.Harmonic: Selects an Even or Odd harmonic relationship between the passband peaks.
parameters-en.Spread: Controls the apparent stereo width between the left and right channels.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the modulation effect and the dry signal.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
parameters-en.Headroom: Provides up to 12.0 dB of additional headroom.
